title: Research Associate I
description: Syneos Health, a leading contract research organization, is hiring a Research Associate I to support clinical trial operations in Milwaukee. You'll coordinate patient recruitment, manage study documentation, ensure compliance with regulatory requirements, and assist with data collection. This entry-level position offers a clear pathway into clinical research for someone with strong organizational skills and attention to detail.
responsibilities: Recruit and screen potential study participants according to protocol-specified inclusion/exclusion criteria
Obtain informed consent and document participant enrollment procedures
Schedule participant visits and coordinate study-related appointments
Maintain confidential participant records and trial documentation
Assist with data collection, entry, and verification under supervision
Ensure compliance with Good Clinical Practice (GCP) guidelines and regulatory requirements

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; some college coursework preferred
skills: Attention to detail and documentation skills
Basic computer literacy and data entry
Knowledge of clinical research basics (training provided)

benefits: Health insurance with dental and vision coverage
